long_description:
[MON] Sysdig Agents Not Deployed is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_agents_not_deployed.html
TIP Situation: Sysdig agents are not deployed on some nodes
TIP Short Description: Sysdig agents are not deployed on some nodes in mzone2y7 for the past 24 hours
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:eu-es::mzone2y7::
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    sum by (agent_tag_cluster, agent_tag_crn_location)(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready", kube_node_status="true", agent_tag_cluster_type=~"genctl_zonelet|genctl_control|rias"}) > sum by (agent_tag_cluster, agent_tag_crn_location)(sysdig_host_up{agent_tag_cluster_type=~"genctl_zonelet|genctl_control|rias"}) = 206
Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster = 'mzone2y7' and agent_tag_crn_location = 'eu-es'

Time:             12/08/2025 07:16 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://eu-es.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/746d6f25-66a3-4e4d-9433-6520ea9b2143?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F8042654%2Fdetails
